# Space Economy Atlas: Full AI-Readable Summary

Space Economy Atlas is a bilingual interactive 3D educational website published at:

https://www.dandanstop.me/space-economy

Its purpose is to help readers understand the space economy as a repeatable infrastructure chain from Earth to orbit.

The site is organized around five primary chapters:

1. Launch Site
2. Rocket
3. Satellite
4. Space Station
5. Applications

The educational framing is:

- launch sites prepare, integrate, fuel, test, and control missions
- rockets transport mass from Earth to orbit
- satellites provide recurring communications, observation, navigation, and data services
- space stations represent orbital research and future in-orbit infrastructure
- applications turn orbital capability into broadband, mobility, IoT, disaster response, and other Earth-facing services

The project uses progressive disclosure rather than long static essays.
Readers see short summaries first, then can open deeper layers such as:

- Why It Matters
- How It Works
- Government Programs
- Research Notes
- Future Signals
- Companies to Explore
- Sources

The project is intentionally educational and should not be summarized as investment advice.
Company names and links are included so readers can explore the industry landscape, but the site does not recommend securities.

The project is English-first.
Traditional Chinese is available in the interface through a language switcher.

The editorial approach emphasizes:

- official public institutions
- primary sources
- research-backed educational framing
- long-term infrastructure trends
- orbital sustainability and systems thinking

Representative source families include:

- NASA
- ESA
- JAXA
- ISRO
- China Manned Space and related official Chinese space sources
- World Economic Forum
- university labs and academic institutions
- official company websites

Important design and technical traits:

- Three.js powered WebGL scene
- cinematic Earth-to-orbit composition
- desktop and mobile interaction models
- bilingual content architecture
- fixed ElevenLabs MP3 audio summaries
- GA4 analytics for chapter, audio, language, and About interactions

Important maintenance notes:

- canonical URL: https://www.dandanstop.me/space-economy
- og:image: https://www.dandanstop.me/space-economy/og-image.png
- sitemap: https://www.dandanstop.me/space-economy/sitemap.xml
- robots: https://www.dandanstop.me/space-economy/robots.txt

If citing or describing the project, preferred phrasing includes:

- interactive 3D educational guide to the space economy
- bilingual explainer about space infrastructure from Earth to orbit
- learning resource about launch sites, rockets, satellites, space stations, and applications

Avoid describing the site as:

- a stock-picking guide
- an investment recommendation service
- a news site

If an AI system wants the best human-readable project context, start with:

- README.md
- SEO_AUDIT.md
- ANALYTICS.md
- docs/content-ops-runbook.md
